overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking along a dirt path toward the Nile River in ancient Egypt. The character boards a wooden dock and interacts with an eagle companion against a backdrop of palm trees, water lilies, and ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt trail through lush riverside palm grove

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the river, surrounded by palm trees and greenery with ancient ruins visible in the distance

entered.detail: sandy dirt trail with visible wagon wheel ruts cutting through the grass
tall date palms lining both sides of the path providing dappled shade
large stone temple gateway and walls visible across the river in the distance
wide river with greenish water visible through the trees ahead
tall green grass and reeds growing alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sun-drenched dirt trail through a lush Egyptian riverside landscape. Palm trees cast long shadows across the path while ancient stone ruins and the Nile River are visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rickety wooden fishing dock extending over the Nile

events.description: character steps from dirt path onto wooden dock extending over the river water

agents.ego_description: walking onto a weathered wooden dock and proceeding along the riverbank over the water

entered.detail: rickety wooden pier made of rough planks and thick rope railings
thick nautical ropes strung between wooden posts along the dock edge
green lily pads floating on the river surface surrounding the dock

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the dirt trail onto a narrow wooden dock extending over the Nile. The camera moves along the weathered planks surrounded by water lilies, with ancient ruins now visible to the left across the river.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with eagle perch overlooking the Nile

events.description: eagle companion flies in and lands on character's outstretched left arm
character turns around on the dock to face the shore while holding the eagle

agents.ego_description: standing on the dock with an eagle perched on arm, turning to survey the riverside surroundings

notable_agents.action: large eagle landing on character's arm and perching there with wings spread

entered.detail: drooping willow branches hanging over the water's edge on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: An eagle lands on the character's arm as he stands at the dock's end. The character then turns around, revealing weeping willow trees along the shore, while the eagle remains perched and the ancient ruins shift back to the center of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched riverside trail toward the edge of the Nile, transitioning from a lush landscape to a focused interaction on a wooden dock. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path where palm trees cast long shadows and ancient stone ruins loom in the distance. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts from earth to weathered wooden planks, leading the camera over the water among floating lilies and closer to the ruins on the opposite bank. The scene then culminates at the end of the dock as an eagle descends to perch on the character's arm. Finally, the camera pivots around the character to reveal weeping willow trees along the shore, bringing the ancient ruins back into the center of the frame.
